title: AI2 Robotics raises Series B funding to advance AlphaBot, embodied AI
description:
AI2 Robotics brought its valuation to more than $1 billion as it develops VLA models for semi-humanoid robots.

The post AI2 Robotics raises Series B funding to advance AlphaBot, embodied AI appeared first on The Robot Report.
